name: KINETIC-DICE TERMINAL V1.5 | (THE APEX PREDATOR)
description: Kinetic-Dice Terminal is an institutional-grade, quantitative risk-management application for live-dealer roulette. Operating on a strict 2-unit exposure model, the engine translates kinetic momentum (Spin A and Spin B) into symmetrical, zero-overlap geometric strike zones. Featuring an autonomous tactical state machine, Pre-Flight table qualification, and real-time equity analytics, it strips human emotion from the casino environment and transforms variance into calculated, algorithmic arbitrage.
